name: Specs Document View
summary: Document-style view for reading spec node details in a linear format
goals: Display spec node content in a readable document format
Support navigation between related spec documents

specDetail.description: A SpecsDocument component that renders a selected spec node as a structured document. Shows the node's full specification including summary, goals, design reference, acceptance criteria, constraints, and metadata in a readable linear format.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: ID of the spec node to display

parameters.name: showBreadcrumbs
parameters.description: Show navigation breadcrumbs above the document

parameters.name: showChildren
parameters.description: Include a table of contents for child nodes

parameters.name: onNavigate
parameters.description: Callback for navigating to related nodes

constraints: Must render markdown content within spec fields (description, constraints)
Must show a table of contents sidebar for nodes with children
Must support deep-linking to specific spec documents via URL

acceptanceCriteria.then: the full spec content is rendered in a readable document format with navigation

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
